# Security Policy 🛡️

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of **TicketsPlease** and its core Enterprise components are supported with
security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| :------ | :-------- |
| v1.x    | ✅ Yes    |
| < v1.0  | ❌ No     |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

We take the security of TicketsPlease very seriously. If you believe you have found a security
vulnerability, please report it to us by:

1. Opening a
   [Private Vulnerability Report](https://github.com/Tobia/TicketsPlease/security/advisories/new) on
   GitHub.
2. Or by emailing the lead maintainer (Information found in the profile).

### Our Process

- We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours.
- We will provide a detailed response with the next steps.
- We will coordinate a fix and a release before making the vulnerability public.

Thank you for helping keep TicketsPlease secure!
